$comment: Role -> pi model spec (provider/model:thinking). No secrets here; credentials live in the gitignored auth.json / ambient AWS/gcloud env, which pi resolves on its own. WORK machine: claude via Amazon Bedrock + gemini via Google Vertex + chatgpt via GitHub Copilot. No deepseek. Read by agents/_lib/roles.mjs (skills + subagent extension). No gemini-3.5-pro available (gemini-3.1-pro likely worse than 3.5-flash), so gemini-3.5-flash carries every gemini role. Strengths used: opus=judgment/planning (impl + deep review), gpt-5.5=thorough implementer, gemini-3.5-flash=adversarial reviewer (general-review:high) + recon + vision + cheap text + grounded search.
$comment_unverified: bedrock/vertex/copilot ids are UNVERIFIED from the home machine — confirm each against `pi --list-models` on the work machine and correct. Bump the bedrock opus id to the latest opus available on Bedrock (4-8 may not be there yet). The gemini-3.5 and gpt-5.5 ids are best-guesses.
